steps.title: Use the formula at the missing x-value
steps.content: The missing table value $a$ is the y-value when $x=3$. Evaluate the given equation $y=4(2)^x+3$ at $x=3$.

steps.title: Desmos check
steps.content: A quick Desmos check is to graph $y=4(2)^x+3$ and evaluate it at $x=3$. The vertical line $x=3$ hits the graph at $y=35$, which is the missing table value. That matches choice B.
